name: ente-auth
tagline: An authentication app for generating and managing encrypted two-factor codes
description: Ente is an end-to-end encrypted photo and file backup solution with open-source clients. It lets users back up and browse media across devices while keeping encryption keys under their control, and also offers a hosted cloud service.

features.title: End-to-End Encryption
features.description: Photos encrypted before leaving your device. Zero-knowledge security

features.title: Real-Time Sync
features.description: Access media on all your devices seamlessly. Synchronized everywhere

features.title: Database Backup
features.description: Never lose precious memories. Continuous protection

features.title: Data Privacy
features.description: You hold the encryption keys, not us. True privacy guaranteed

features.title: Self-Hosted
features.description: Run your own backup server. Complete data sovereignty
